intro:
Tinder has a strong presence in France. Embir launched in France as one of its primary markets — with verified profiles, bidirectional orientation filtering, and full features free at launch.

Happn and Fruitz also have strong presence in French cities. Embir launched in France as a primary market with full French interface and support.

sections.title: Embir in France — the better alternative
sections.content: Tinder has name recognition in France, but Embir offers something fundamentally better: strict bidirectional orientation filtering, verified profiles, human moderation, and complete free access during launch.
highlights: France is a primary launch market for Embir
Free during launch — no subscription required

verdict: In France, Embir is the best alternative to Tinder in 2026: verified profiles, bidirectional filtering, universal LGBTQ+ inclusivity, and free at launch.
ctaText: Join Embir in France — free at launch

faq.a: Yes. France is one of Embir's primary launch markets. The founding community is active and growing.

faq.q: How does Embir compare to Tinder in France?
faq.a: Embir offers verified profiles, bidirectional filtering, LGBTQ+ inclusivity, and free access that Tinder doesn't match.
Yes. Core features are free during the launch phase.
